questions.text: Which class or activity do you look forward to most in school?

options.label: Math, Science, or English — I like thinking hard
Art, Music, Drama, or Dance
Gym, Technology, or Hands-on projects
I like most classes — nothing really stands out yet

questions.text: If someone described you to a stranger, which would fit best?

options.label: The one who reads everything and asks a million questions
The creative one — always making something
The social one — friends everywhere, always involved
The well-rounded one — a bit of everything

questions.text: How far would you comfortably travel to school every day?

options.label: Walking distance only — close to home
Up to 30 minutes on the TTC — that's fine
Up to 60 minutes — worth it for the right program
Distance doesn't matter if it's the right fit

questions.text: How do you feel about doing an audition, portfolio, or application to get into a school?

options.label: I'd love it — I want to prove myself
I'd do it if I believed in the program enough
I'd prefer guaranteed enrollment — applications stress me out
I'd apply if the process is through the school board

questions.text: Have you ever been told you might qualify for a gifted program?

options.label: Yes — I've already been tested or identified as gifted
My teacher or parent has mentioned it as a possibility
I've wondered about it but never been assessed
Not really — that's not my situation

questions.text: Is there a specific type of program you've already been looking into?

options.label: Arts, Music, Drama, Dance, or Media
IB, French Immersion, or Technology/STEM
A school outside my catchment (not a specialty program)
I haven't looked into anything specific yet
